one_liner: VectorForge — GPU-native vector database for real-time RAG at inference scale.
founder_ctx: Two co-founders. CEO: ex-Staff Engineer on Pinecone's query engine (3 yrs). CTO: PhD in approximate nearest-neighbor search, 400+ citations, maintainer of a 6k-star ANN library.

claims.text: 3 design partners in production, 220M vectors served/day, 3x QoQ query growth.

evidence.snippet: VectorForge confirms three enterprise design partners running its GPU vector engine in production, citing ~200M daily vector queries.
vectorforge/core — 2,900 stars, 180 forks, active commits over 14 months, benchmarks showing 3x QPS vs CPU baselines.

claims.text: CTO is a recognized ANN researcher and maintainer of a widely used open-source library.

evidence.snippet: annlib — 6,100 stars. Primary maintainer listed with commits spanning 5 years.
Author profile shows 410 citations across ANN and vector search papers.

claims.text: Vector database TAM expanding with RAG adoption; inference-time retrieval is the bottleneck.

evidence.snippet: Analysts project vector database spend growing sharply through 2027 as retrieval-augmented generation moves to production.

claims.text: $18K MRR from two paid design partners, converting a third pilot next quarter.

evidence.snippet: The company says two of its three design partners are on paid contracts, with a third pilot underway.
